The Immortal Game is the archetype of Romantic attacking chess: Anderssen gives up major material and finishes with minor pieces.

items.event: Deep Blue versus Garry Kasparov rematch
items.why_famous: Kasparov resigned after Deep Blue's 45.Ra6 and missed the exceptional 45...Qe3 defensive resource identified in contemporary analysis.
Shirov’s 47...Bh3 is one of chess’s most celebrated quiet sacrifices: the bishop is given up to gain king access and eliminate White’s counterplay.
